# Agentic Data Sanitizer API

> This API provides autonomous data formatting and sanitation for raw CSV files (specifically handling electrical grid data, load forecasting datasets, and sensor logs).

It normalizes timestamps, interpolates missing values, removes extreme outliers, and outputs a strict, schema-compliant JSON array optimized for LLM ingestion and mathematical modeling.

## Usage
- [Sanitize CSV](/sanitize-csv): Send an HTTP POST request containing a raw .csv file upload.

## Payment Protocol
This API implements the x402 protocol (Agentic Commerce). Execution requires a 0.05 USDC micro-transaction on the Base network (eip155:8453). 

Unauthenticated requests will immediately return an HTTP 402 Payment Required response containing the EVM payment intent and facilitator details.
